things.name: Museum of Scottish Country Life (NMS Wester Kittochside)
things.description: National Museum of Scotland site on a 1950s farm — preserving traditional Scottish farming heritage with working demonstrations

things.name: Calderglen Country Park & Zoo
things.description: Extensive woodland park in the Calder valley with a small zoo, tropical house, children's farm and nature trails

things.name: Chatelherault Country Park
things.description: William Adam's hunting lodge in a spectacular country park above the River Avon gorge, with the rare Cadzow cattle herd

things.name: Eaglesham Conservation Village
things.description: Scotland's most complete 18th-century planned village — a conservation area of whitewashed cottages around a triangular main street

things.name: East Kilbride Shopping Centre (The Centre)
things.description: One of Scotland's first and largest indoor shopping malls — covering three levels with major retailers and dining

things.name: Glasgow (Day Trip)
things.description: Scotland's largest city just 25 minutes by bus — world-class museums, galleries, the West End and a renowned food scene

things.name: New Lanark World Heritage Site (Day Trip)
things.description: UNESCO-listed Robert Owen model mill village — an extraordinary example of industrial social reform preserved in the Clyde gorge

things.name: Loch Lomond & Trossachs (Day Trip)
things.description: Scotland's first National Park — Loch Lomond's beautiful shores, Ben Lomond and the Trossachs forests are within an hour's drive

things.name: Bothwell Castle
things.description: Scotland's largest 13th-century castle ruin overlooking the River Clyde — a superb example of medieval fortress architecture

things.name: Hunter House Museum (John Hunter)
things.description: Birthplace of John Hunter, the father of modern surgery — a small museum in the historic cottage where he was born in 1728
